description_long: This handbag features a semi-circular, wedge-like shape with a flat base and a gently curved top. The exterior is crafted from woven strips in a checkered pattern, combining shades of white, cream, yellow, and dark gray. A thin yellow border outlines the edges, adding definition and contrast to the design. The bag is equipped with a single, slender wrist strap attached at one end, allowing for easy carrying. The closure appears to be a zipper running along the straight edge of the semicircle. The overall look is artisanal and lightweight, suitable for casual urban outings.
description: A semi-circular woven handbag with a checkered pattern in white, yellow, and gray, featuring a yellow border, zipper closure, and a single wrist strap.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the triangular profile, yellow border, and the checkered base pattern.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full semi-circular woven face, checkered pattern, yellow border, and the wrist strap attached at the left.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view highlighting the triangular profile, visible wrist strap, and checkered base.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, showing the semi-circular woven face and yellow border, with the wrist strap attachment on the right.
attribute_strap_type: single thin wrist strap, non-adjustable, attached at one end of the zipper
attribute_closure_mechanism: zipper closure along the straight edge of the semicircle
attribute_pattern: checkered woven pattern in white, yellow, cream, and gray
